channel.title: Intel on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Intel on Have an average day :|

item.title: Intel 520 'Cherryville' Series 240GB SSD Review in RAID 0 - Next Stop, Cherryville - Legit Reviews
item.description: To that extent, Intel has informed us that they are now the first and only 2.5″ SandForce drive manufacturer to have their drives ship with OEM computers which is a pretty big deal and an easy way to get a lot of drives out to consumers. via Intel 520 ‘Cherryville’ Series 240GB SSD Review in RAID 0 – Next Stop, Cherryville – Legit Reviews. I love it when performance parts go OEM.
